messages.body: Hi, can you share pricing for the team plan?
Sure — the team plan is 40000 per year. We can start in March.

idealSummary: They asked for team-plan pricing. We quoted 40000 per year with a March start.

messages.body: Are we still on for the demo?
Yes — Thursday at 2pm works.

idealSummary: They confirmed the demo for Thursday at 2pm.

messages.body: The seats pricing feels high for us.
Understood — happy to look at a smaller tier.

idealSummary: They raised a seats-pricing objection; we offered to look at a smaller tier.

messages.body: What's next on Orion?
A security review with your team, then we countersign.

idealSummary: The next step on Orion is a security review, after which we countersign.

messages.body: Good news — the Quantum budget was approved at 80000.

idealSummary: The Quantum budget was approved at 80000.

messages.body: We're also evaluating Wingman.
Makes sense — happy to help you compare.

idealSummary: They are also evaluating Wingman; we offered to help compare.

messages.body: Priya is our VP of Engineering and will lead this.

idealSummary: Priya, the VP of Engineering, will lead the engagement.

messages.body: The Vertex renewal lands in September.
Noted — we'll prep the paperwork.

idealSummary: The Vertex renewal lands in September; we will prep the paperwork.

messages.body: What's holding up Nimbus?
Procurement approval — we're chasing it.

idealSummary: The Nimbus blocker is procurement approval, which we are chasing.

messages.body: Can you do better on price?
We can offer 15 percent off.

idealSummary: They asked for a better price; we offered 15 percent off.

messages.body: The Orion contract value is 45000.
When do you need the proposal?
By March 15, ideally.

idealSummary: They need the proposal by March 15.

messages.body: Quantum kickoff confirmed for Monday.

idealSummary: The Quantum kickoff is confirmed for Monday.

messages.body: Halcyon renewal is 32000.
And it lands in September.

idealSummary: The Halcyon renewal is 32000 and lands in September.

messages.body: Our API keys stopped working this morning.
We rotated them — new keys are in your dashboard.

idealSummary: Their API keys stopped working; we rotated them and the new keys are in the dashboard.
